product.title: Maybelline Instant Age Rewind Eraser Foundation with SPF 20 and Moisturizing ProVitamin B5, 120, 1 Count (Packaging May Vary)
featureBullets: Blur Signs Of Aging In An Instant: Click to instantly blur with Maybelline’s Instant Age Rewind Eraser Treatment Foundation. This moisturizing Maybelline foundation with SPF 20 covers uneven skin tone, fine lines and wrinkles for a natural look that lasts

Natural Make Up Finish: The blurring built-in applicator erases lines while the sponge tip glides on ultra-smooth for a natural finish that won’t settle into fine lines and wrinkles. Get buildable, medium coverage with this makeup foundation

Delivers All Day Comfort: Quickly conceal age spots and dryness with our foundation makeup, formulated with moisturizing ProVitamin B5 and SPF 20. Available in 16 non-comedogenic face makeup shades for a range of skin tones. Suitable for sensitive skin

Maybelline Has What You Need: Create any look with foundation, BB cream, concealer and highlighter for the perfect canvas, eye shadow, brow pencil, mascara and eyeliner for any eye look and lip products, from matte lipstick to au natural lip gloss
Remove Maybelline Makeup With Micellar Water: Use Garnier Micellar Water as a gentle makeup remover at night, and as a facial cleanser in the morning to prep skin for Maybelline makeup
product.description: Maybelline Instant Age Rewind Eraser Foundation is an anti-aging foundation that is the result of seven years of research and 3 patents. The exclusive sponge applicator seamlessly blends the foundation and skin immediately appears smooth and youthful. Packaging may vary, what you receive may not be what is reflected on site. Erases the look of fine lines while hydrating Patented micro-corrector applicator helps to fill and smooth imperfections on the skin's surface. Anti-aging foundation with spf 18 and antioxidants protect skin from damage Not Applicable Step 1. Twist in the direction of arrows until the foundation is visible on the sponge (it may take some turns on the first use). Step 2. Using the applicator, apply foundation directly to face, blending in an outward motion. Step 3. To clean, wipe off excess with a dry tissue only. Do not wet. For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Discontinue use if signs of irritation or rash appear. Keep out of reach of children.

variants.title: Mascara, Concealer, Lip Gloss Bundle 3 Count

specification.value: Instant Age Rewind® Eraser Treatment Makeup. This super-concentrated formula with goji berry hydrates the skin, while the exclusive applicator covers, fills, and smoothes to reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.

Active Ingredient:Octinoxate 7.5%.Inactive Ingredients: Cyclopentasiloxane, Water,Dimethicone Crosspolymer,Glycerin, Isotridecyl Isononanoate,Peg-9 Polydimethylsiloxyethyl Dimethicone, Disteardimonium Hectorite,Phenoxyethanol,Peg-10 Dimethicone,Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein/Pvp Crosspolymer,Disodium Stearoyl Glutamate,Chlorphenesin,Methylparaben,Lycium Barbarum Fruit Extract,Acrylates Copolymer,Potassium Sorbate,Ethylparaben,Tocopherol Ascorbyl Palmitate,Panthenol,Peg-9,Aluminum Hydroxide,Citric Acid,Sodium Pca,Urea,Trehalose,Polyquaternium-51,Soluble Collagen,Sodium Hyaluronate.[+/=- May Contain: Iron Oxides,Titanium Dioxide,Mica.]
#2,964 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #35 in Foundation Makeup
reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this foundation to be a great quality product that provides light to medium coverage and conceals dark spots and blemishes effectively. The foundation is easy to apply with its built-in sponge, feels very light on the skin, and evens out skin tone while giving a nice glow. They appreciate its seamless blendability and consider it good value for money.

reviews.reviewTitle: Great coverage, love the sponge applicator, great value for money
reviews.reviewText: This is a great concealer that I use daily. The top twists and product is dispensed through the sponge at the top. With every twist the mechanism from the bottom spirals up delivering your product. It goes on smoothly and covers well. I like this product better than the one sold by Maybelline in the slim container. Using every day, it usually lasts me around four months. Great value for the money and I like this over many other expensive brands bought before. I exclusively order this from Amazon as I have not been able to find it in my region in stores. I order the color 110 which is perfect for my very pale, fair skin. Covers acne scars and other skin blemishes well. I usually wait for it to dry for a minute and then add my foundation. It provides good coverage without being too thick or heavy. It also has SPF 20 which is perfect for laying with foundation for fair skin.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 14, 2025

reviews.reviewText: This is the most amazing cover up. I have used it for several years. It hides veins, discoloration, blemishes, and any other skin issues you want to cover up. It goes on really smoothly, blends well, and it takes very little so it goes a long way. The hardest part is ascertaining the correct shade but, once you do that, you will love this product. I even heard a makeup expert on a radio show talking about it and saying it was his number one choice. I like the applicator, too. Very easy to use.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 19, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Even, smooth long lasting coverage! Very natural looking!!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 21, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Almost perfect—just wish the container worked better! ⭐⭐⭐⭐
reviews.reviewText: I really wanted to give the Maybelline Instant Age Rewind Eraser Foundation five stars—it has so much going for it! The color match was spot-on, the formula blends beautifully, and the sponge applicator makes it super easy to apply (once you get it going). A little truly goes a long way, and the coverage is just right—not too heavy, not too sheer. That said, I did run into some issues with the container. It took quite a bit of twisting to get the product to dispense initially, and toward the end, a noticeable amount was left behind and couldn’t be accessed. It felt like a bit of a waste, which was disappointing given how well the product performs otherwise. If the container were redesigned for better functionality, this would absolutely be a five-star favorite. Still, the foundation itself is fantastic, and I’ll likely repurchase—just hoping for a packaging upgrade in the future!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on August 14, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I’m 55 years old and I’ve used this foundation for a few years now. It feels like you’re not wearing makeup but it gives great coverage and blends very well! I don’t feel like it settles in fine lines, etc. I hope they never discontinue this!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 26, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Maybelleine hit this one out of the park.
reviews.reviewText: This is the best concealer! I need to even out my skin, which has some redness and dark patches from years of sun (I guess).. It's inexpensive, another huge plus, but not the reason I keep returning to it after wasting hundreds of dollars on fancy brands, sold to me in stores by brand representatives. I have many fine lines, and don't want expensive injections that, IMHO, make me look ridiculous. Nothing sillier than a perfectly smooth unmoving forehead. This product looks natural, color matches perfectly, and blends discolored areas without looking like latex paint. Highly recommend for older people who don't like the look of makeup. The bottle is small, but the sponge applicator uses very little product and spreads nicely. SPF 30 is about right to block burn during my daily routine. I want to give Maybelleine marketing props for not renaming colors, so I can't buy again with confidence. Somehow a drugstore/supermarket product beats everything else when you just want to improve your appearance without a clown face. Not trying to disparage young people who like to use their faces as art palettes. That was fun for me when I was young. Now I would look like a clown. Age Rewind is a perfect product for me.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 8, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I dont like that it has to be turned to come out I can never tell if theres any on the sponge It is very light weight so it does cover nicely without showing heavy and does cover blemishes
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 15, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Great cover up make up! Impossible to get this in the stores now so delighted to be able to buy on line!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 7, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Seems to be helping slightly with the brown marks above my lip.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on August 5, 2016

reviews.reviewText: Yes, exactly what was shown and described.
